opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is tearing through my entire pelvis and lower back, and nothing I take is dulling the agony.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My pelvic pain suddenly became unbearable about twelve hours ago, I'm vomiting and can't stand, and none of my painkillers are touching it — I need help now.

symptom_narrative.onset: it started about twelve hours ago as a dull ache and has built up to unbearable
symptom_narrative.duration: about 12 hours, getting worse the whole time
symptom_narrative.character: sharp, throbbing, tearing pain across my whole pelvis and lower back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I'm curled up and can't move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the whole pelvis, radiating down both thighs and into my lower back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, with agonising spikes when my bladder fills or I open my bowels
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing, not even a heat pack
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, and my bladder filling or bowels moving trigger awful spikes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: terrible nausea and I've been vomiting, exhausted, and I can't stand or walk to the toilet
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have endometriosis and get bad flares, but this feels different and far worse than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed curled up and can't get to the bathroom

past_medical_history.how_managed: hormonal contraception and painkillers for flares

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taken the maximum on the packet
maxed out the daily dose with no effect

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my partner is here but really distressed, and I can't keep fluids down with the vomiting

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: likely elevated by severe pain and possible dehydration
